metaData.Key Information: Lion Dance Pork Ball has a unique and delicate flavour. It is superb for Steamboat, cooking Soups and with Noodles it can be deep fried and BBQ. Make your Soups and Noodles more flavourful with Lion Dance Pork Ball. It also contains no preservatives.
metaData.Preparation:
1. Make the Soups with ingredients
2. Heat the Soup to its boiling point
3. Add the Pork Ball into the Soup for about 3 minutes and stir well
4. Serve

metaData.Ingredients: Pork, Pork Fat, Thickener (E1412), Sole Fish Powder (Sole Fish Fillet), Seasoning Powder {Salt, Flavour Enhancers (E621, E635), Corn Flour, Sugar, Maltodextrin, Palm Fat, Synthetic Flavourings [(Contains Egg, Wheat), Lactose (Milk Derivative), Canola Seed], Soy Sauce [Maltodextrin, Soybean, Salt, Wheat, Caramel, Synthetic Flavouring, Flavour Enhancers (E635, L-Alanine), Spices]}, Salt, Sugar, Preservative [Ins262(I), Salt, Dextrose, Rapeseed Oil, Fully Hydrogenated Rapeseed Fat, Emulsifier (E471)], Emulsifiers [Ins450(I), Ins451(I)], Flavour Enhancer [Salt, Yeast Extract, Hydrolysed Vegetable Protein (Contains Soybean), Natural Flavouring, Anticaking Agent (E551)] and Spices.
metaData.Preparation: To cook in boiling water for 5 minutes before consumption.
metaData.SAP Product Name: FAIRPRICE PORK MEAT BALL WITH SOLEFISH 200G
metaData.Storage Information: Keep refrigerated (4°C & below). Best consumed within 3 days from opening.
